text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next week is the long-awaited tryouts! For newbie trainers like me,
this event is our first step on our journeys to bringing out the best in
every racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the tryouts, each runner does their best to show off their abilities
to prospective trainers, who then scout them. It's an important event
for both parties.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While there's still time between now and then, my nerves—and
excitement—are getting the better of me. I decide to take a stroll to
calm down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I walk through a park near the academy, I hear the sound of
children playing. I turn towards the source of the noise, only to see an
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aw yeah! Time's up! Looks like I win again!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Y-you're too fast, Tama!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
How're we s'posed to tag you when you're the fastest runner?! You're
not playing faaair!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nyahaha! Life isn't fair, squirts! 'Sides, ya wouldn't want me goin' easy
on ya just 'cause you're smaller than me, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! Show us how fast you can run again, and we'll forgive you!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah! I wanna see you go ZOOM! Do it! Do it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What, again? Well, if it'll make you happy, I don't see why not. Back
it up, everybody! Don't want any of ya gettin' hurt!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Okaaay!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, ready, kiddos? I'm only doin' this once, so keep those
peepers peeled!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Uraaagh! Whaddaya think of dis?!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaa! That's so fast!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, the speediest speedster ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those kids aren't kidding. She's a powerful runner, but there's also
this playfulness to it. And her acceleration! It's near
instantaneous—almost like... like...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Did you just say—wait, who're you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly feel everyone's eyes on me. The embarrassment sets in as I
realize I just said that out loud.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for what? You wouldn't be apologizin' if you didn't do anythin'
wrong. And what're ya starin' at anyway? Get behind me, kids!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before this misunderstanding gets out of hand, I quickly stammer out
an explanation.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So you can't even take a walk without daydreamin' about racin'?
Geez, you must love your job a helluva lot.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Talk about coincidences though. You're a rookie trainer, right? Well,
I'm workin' towards my racin' debut myself.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Tamaaa! Hurry up! We wanna play hide and seek next!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, I'll be right with ya! Phew... Where do kids get all that
energy from?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, the name's Tamamo Cross. Since we're both rookies, I get
the feelin' we'll be seein' a lotta each other. See ya 'round!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross... Once she makes her debut, how will her running
evolve? I leave the park with something new to look forward to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One week later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the tryouts is here. I scan the crowd of runners preparing
to race, when I catch sight of one I recognize...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's fine... You've got this in the bag... Just run as fast as you can... get
ahead of everybody... and win!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Losin' here isn't an option. Not now... not ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her demeanor seems completely different from the day we met in the
park. I watch as she takes her position...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff! Huff! I gotta win dis! I gotta! I gotta win no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross is losing steam! She's falling behind the leading racers!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she slips back, so too does her chance to place high in the race...
Confusion furrows my brow. What happened to the runner I saw at the
park?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross, huh? She showed a lot of promise in the beginning of
the race, but she was way too hasty. She failed to maintain the very
pace she set.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she's clearly got the drive, but with that teenie body, there's no
way she can keep up with the competition in the final stretch.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Dammit... Dammit, dammit, dammit! The hell's wrong with me...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Tamamo Cross? You must be exhausted after that run, but
do you have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? Y-yeah, sure...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
I'll cut straight to the point—I want to scout you. You might be rough
around the edges at the moment, but a bit of refining will surely have
you shining in no time.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Really. With me as your trainer, you might make it to the graded
races. In fact, you might even place in the top five. What do you say?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whaddaya mean, "top five"? Give it to me straight—you think I can
ace a G1 race or not?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Well... I can't promise anything. If you work hard, you might have a
chance, but—

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Then get outta my face!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm lookin' to WIN! No ifs, ands, or buts about it! Top five's nowhere near good 'nuff!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But your punk ass thinks that's all I got? Well, screw your stupid offer!
Take your wishy-washy ways and find some other chump!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. What an unruly racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other trainers stand by as Tamamo Cross storms off, unimpressed
by her temper. But that same temper shows how badly she wants to
win...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Dammit... dammit! What a low-down jerk! Treatin' me like a loser...
but why wouldn't he? That's how I ran today...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You're... that trainer from the park...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're a rookie trainer, aren't ya? What makes ya think a no-name
trainer like you has what it takes?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya really think ya can take me on, train me up, and turn me into a
champ?! I'm not just talkin' G1 here—I mean all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rage Tamamo Cross feels boils to the surface, and she lashes out.
I desperately search for words to quell the fire, but to no avail.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Drop the act. You're nothing special, and neither am I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross takes off, leaving me with only my regret as company...
